Class StockfishConnector

java.lang.Object
com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
public class StockfishConnector extends Object

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    StockfishConnector()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    calculateBestMove(int timeLimitMillis)
    Instructs the Stockfish engine to calculate the best move within a specified time limit.
    void
    clearHash()
    Clears the hash table in the Stockfish engine, effectively starting a new game.
    String
    getAnalysisOutput()
    Retrieves the full analysis output from the Stockfish engine up to the point where it finds the best move.
    String
    getBestMove()
    Retrieves the best move suggested by the Stockfish engine based on the current game state.
    List<String>
    getLegalMoves()
    Retrieves a list of legal moves from the current position in the Stockfish engine.
    double
    getMoveRating()
    Retrieves the most recent evaluation rating of the move from the Stockfish engine.
    String
    getResponse()
    Reads and returns the response from the Stockfish engine until a termination keyword is found.
    boolean
    isEngineReady()
    Checks if the Stockfish engine is ready to receive new commands.
    boolean
    isValidMove(String move)
    Checks if a given move is valid based on the current game state in the Stockfish engine.
    void
    sendCommand(String command)
    Sends a specified command to the Stockfish engine for processing.
    void
    setAnalysisDepth(int depth)
    Sets the analysis depth for the Stockfish engine, instructing it to search up to a specific depth.
    void
    setDebugMode(boolean enable)
    Enables or disables debug mode for the Stockfish engine by setting the debug log file.
    void
    setOption(String option, String value)
    Sets a specific option for the Stockfish engine with a given value.
    void
    setThreads(int threads)
    Sets the number of threads to be used by the Stockfish engine for processing.
    boolean
    startEngine()
    Starts the Stockfish engine process and initializes input and output streams for communication.
    void
    stopEngine()
    Stops the Stockfish engine and releases all associated resources.
    void
    updateGameState(String moveHistory)
    Updates the game state in the Stockfish engine to reflect the current position based on the provided move history.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • StockfishConnector

      public StockfishConnector()

  • Method Details

    • startEngine

      public boolean startEngine()
      Starts the Stockfish engine process and initializes input and output streams for communication.
      Returns:
      true if the engine starts successfully, false if an error occurs during the startup process.

    • sendCommand

      public void sendCommand(String command) throws IOException
      Sends a specified command to the Stockfish engine for processing.
      Parameters:
      command - The UCI command to be sent to the engine.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during communication with the engine.

    • getResponse

      public String getResponse() throws IOException
      Reads and returns the response from the Stockfish engine until a termination keyword is found.
      Returns:
      A string containing the response from the engine, up to and including specific keywords such as "uciok", "bestmove", or "readyok".
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while reading from the engine's output stream.

    • getBestMove

      public String getBestMove() throws IOException
      Retrieves the best move suggested by the Stockfish engine based on the current game state.
      Returns:
      A string representing the best move in standard algebraic notation.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while reading from the engine's output stream.

    • stopEngine

      public void stopEngine()
      Stops the Stockfish engine and releases all associated resources. Sends the "quit" command to gracefully terminate the engine process and destroys the process to ensure that it is properly closed. Catches and logs any IOException that occurs during the process.

    • updateGameState

      public void updateGameState(String moveHistory) throws IOException
      Updates the game state in the Stockfish engine to reflect the current position based on the provided move history.
      Parameters:
      moveHistory - A string representing the sequence of moves in standard UCI format. If null or empty, the engine sets the position to the starting position.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while sending the command to the engine.

    • calculateBestMove

      public void calculateBestMove(int timeLimitMillis) throws IOException
      Instructs the Stockfish engine to calculate the best move within a specified time limit.
      Parameters:
      timeLimitMillis - The time limit in milliseconds for the engine to perform the calculation.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while sending the command to the engine.

    • isEngineReady

      public boolean isEngineReady() throws IOException
      Checks if the Stockfish engine is ready to receive new commands.
      Returns:
      true if the engine responds with "readyok", indicating it is ready; false otherwise.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while sending the command or reading the response from the engine.

    • setAnalysisDepth

      public void setAnalysisDepth(int depth) throws IOException
      Sets the analysis depth for the Stockfish engine, instructing it to search up to a specific depth.
      Parameters:
      depth - The number of plies (half-moves) for the engine to analyze.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while sending the command to the engine.

    • setOption

      public void setOption(String option, String value) throws IOException
      Sets a specific option for the Stockfish engine with a given value.
      Parameters:
      option - The name of the option to be configured in the engine.
      value - The value to be assigned to the specified option.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while sending the command to the engine.

    • getLegalMoves

      public List<String> getLegalMoves() throws IOException
      Retrieves a list of legal moves from the current position in the Stockfish engine.
      Returns:
      A list of strings representing all legal moves available from the current position.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while sending the command or reading the response from the engine.

    • setDebugMode

      public void setDebugMode(boolean enable) throws IOException
      Enables or disables debug mode for the Stockfish engine by setting the debug log file.
      Parameters:
      enable - A boolean indicating whether to enable (true) or disable (false) debug mode.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while sending the command to the engine.

    • getAnalysisOutput

      public String getAnalysisOutput() throws IOException
      Retrieves the full analysis output from the Stockfish engine up to the point where it finds the best move.
      Returns:
      A string containing the detailed analysis output from the engine.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while reading the response from the engine.

    • setThreads

      public void setThreads(int threads) throws IOException
      Sets the number of threads to be used by the Stockfish engine for processing.
      Parameters:
      threads - The number of threads to be allocated for the engine's operations.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while sending the command to the engine.

    • clearHash

      public void clearHash() throws IOException
      Clears the hash table in the Stockfish engine, effectively starting a new game.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while sending the command to the engine.

    • isValidMove

      public boolean isValidMove(String move) throws IOException
      Checks if a given move is valid based on the current game state in the Stockfish engine.
      Parameters:
      move - A string representing the move in standard algebraic notation.
      Returns:
      true if the move is legal; false otherwise.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while retrieving legal moves from the engine.

    • getMoveRating

      public double getMoveRating()
      Retrieves the most recent evaluation rating of the move from the Stockfish engine.
      Returns:
      A double representing the evaluation rating of the move, with positive values favoring White and negative values favoring Black.
